allowed_sessions.name: Allowed Sessions
allowed_sessions.hint: Allowed sessions in the format of `<adapter_name>:<gm/dm>:<session_id>`

zh.name: 允许的会话
zh.hint: 允许访问的会话，格式为 `<adapter_name>:<gm/dm>:<session_id>`

allowed_exec_sessions.name: Allowed Exec Sessions
allowed_exec_sessions.hint: Allowed sessions to use `exec` tool in the format of `<adapter_name>:<gm/dm>:<session_id>`

zh.name: 允许执行命令的会话
zh.hint: 允许使用 exec 工具的会话，格式为 `<adapter_name>:<gm/dm>:<session_id>`

extra_read_paths.name: Extra Read Paths
extra_read_paths.hint: Additional allowed path prefixes for read_file and list_files (data/files, data/temp and data/skills are always allowed)

zh.name: 额外允许读取的路径
zh.hint: read_file 和 list_files 额外允许的路径前缀（data/files、data/temp 和 data/skills 始终允许）

extra_write_paths.name: Extra Write Paths
extra_write_paths.hint: Additional allowed path prefixes for write_file and edit_file

zh.name: 额外允许写入的路径
zh.hint: write_file 和 edit_file 额外允许的路径前缀
